topic: ICE BofA HY OAS current state Jan 2026
summary: OAS at 2.81% on Jan 5, 2026, near cyclical lows. Downtrend from 3.0% in late Nov. Resolution on Jan 30, 2026.
content: Current value: 2.81% (Jan 5, 2026). Recent 30-day range: 2.81-3.00%. Mean: 2.90%. Daily vol: ~0.03pp. Downtrend over past 6 weeks. Near historical lows - spreads were at similar levels in late 2024 before widening briefly. Mean reversion likely. January typically sees new issuance which could widen spreads slightly. Monte Carlo blended model (trend + zero drift + mean reversion + fat tails) centers at ~2.80 with std of 0.146.
